# Allan Ramos — Lead / Chief Architect

I connect business outcomes to the enterprise systems that carry them—capability design,
architecture governance, and transformation the organization can absorb. Banking and insurance.

## Practice
- Business → capability → ownership before solutions
- Options and trade-offs (rebuild / buy / reuse / migrate) with cost, risk, and readiness
- Architecture governance across parallel programmes
- Sequencing change so the business keeps running
- Aligning executives, product, risk, and delivery on one target-state story

## Selected outcomes (organizations omitted)
- Multi-market insurance product platform (shared capabilities across markets)
- Estate modernization: ~25% lower operating cost, ~40% less downtime where change landed
- Cross-domain integration so processes read as one business flow
- Productized delivery with durable architecture review practice

## Credentials
- TOGAF® Enterprise Architecture
- ArchiMate®
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert
- Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect
- ITIL® 4
- SAFe® Architect
- IBM IT Specialist Profession — Level 1
- IBM Mentor · Design Thinking Co-Creator

## Education & research
- MEng, Computer Software Engineering (U. Porto); BE, Computer Engineering
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=E5rZhPcAAAAJ
